title: Claim Your BTH

ready.prompt: Someone sent you a claim link.
ready.privacyNote: We only contact the network once you tap above — your link stays private until then.

errors.notValidGeneric: This claim link is not valid.
errors.noLink: No claim link found. The link should look like .../claim#…
errors.invalidDestination: Enter a valid destination address (tbotho://… or botho://…).
errors.newWalletPassword: Set a password for your new wallet before claiming.
errors.confirmOverwrite: Confirm replacing the wallet already stored on this device before claiming.

waiting: Waiting for the sender's payment to confirm on-chain. This page will update automatically — it can take a minute or two.
alreadyClaimed: This link has already been claimed.

claimable.feeCovered: Network fee of {{fee}} BTH covered by the sender.
claimable.createWallet: Don't have a wallet? Create one
claimable.recoveryPhraseNote: Write this down and keep it safe — it is the ONLY way to recover this wallet. We'll save it encrypted in this browser when you claim.
claimable.passwordPrompt: Set a password — your wallet is encrypted on this device with it.
claimable.overwriteWarningStrong: This device already has a wallet{{suffix}}.
claimable.overwriteWarning: Claiming with this NEW wallet replaces the stored one and deletes its seed — any funds in it are lost unless you have its recovery phrase backed up.
claimable.bearerWarning: This is a bearer link — anyone with it can claim. Claim promptly so no one else does first.

claimed.onTheirWay: The funds are on their way to your address.
claimed.deleteMessageNote: For your privacy, delete the message that contained this link from your chat. It's already claimed and can't be used again, but removing it keeps the secret out of your message history and backups.
